html:
Exclusive to:

Veggie Burger is a Crock Pot recipe exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in Return of Them. It is cooked by combining Leafy Meat, Onion and Vegetable value of at least 1.0. It takes 40 seconds to cook.

Despite being a "Veggie Burger", it is actually considered as a meat item, thus, it is passable as food for Wigfrid. However, Wurt will still refuse to eat it.

Recipe

×1.0

Examples

Tips

  • If one has a Lureplant farm and a reliable way of obtaining Onions, Veggie Burgers can be a solid balanced food option. However, Beefy Greens might be preferable for health and hunger. Jelly Salad provides more sanity but requires 2 Leafy Meat, resulting in less stats if Leafy Meat is the limiting factor.

Trivia

  • The Veggie Burger was introduced in the Troubled Waters update.

Gallery

  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

'''Veggie Burger''' is a [[Crock Pot]] recipe exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is cooked by combining [[Leafy Meat]], [[Onion]] and [[Vegetable]] value of at least 1.0. It takes 40 seconds to cook.

Despite being a "Veggie Burger", it is actually considered as a [[Meats|meat]] item, thus, it is passable as food for [[Wigfrid]]. However, [[Wurt]] will still refuse to eat it.

== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Leafy Meats
|item2 = Onions
|item3 = Vegetables
|comparator3 = ×
|count3 = 1.0
|item4 = Filler
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Veggie Burger
}}

== {{pic|32|Crock Pot}} Examples ==
{{Recipe
|item1=Leafy Meats
|item2=Onions
|item3=Kelp Fronds
|item4=Kelp Fronds
|result=Veggie Burger
|tool=Crock Pot}}

{{Recipe
|item1 = Leafy Meats
|item2 = Onions
|item3 = Carrot
|item4 = Ice
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Veggie Burger
}}

{{Recipe
|item1 = Leafy Meats
|item2 = Onions
|item3 = Eggplant
|item4 = Twigs
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Veggie Burger
}}

== {{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* If one has a [[Meat Bulb (Lureplant)|Lureplant]] farm and a reliable way of obtaining Onions, Veggie Burgers can be a solid balanced food option. However, [[Beefy Greens]] might be preferable for health and hunger. [[Jelly Salad]] provides more sanity but requires 2 [[Leafy Meat]], resulting in less stats if Leafy Meat is the limiting factor.

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Veggie Burger was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Troubled Waters|Troubled Waters]]'' update.
